body.title: CLOSED: Igor dreaming module
body.result: dreaming.py + COA cycle counter; 5 tests green; IGOR_DREAMING_INTERVAL=0 disables
body.description:
New module `wild_igor/igor/cognition/dreaming.py`. Scheduled pass triggered every N NE cycles (IGOR_DREAMING_INTERVAL env var, default 50) or manually. Reads: last N psych_log entries, active+recently-resolved watch_problems, escalation dedup_key patterns. Asks NE to synthesize cross-session patterns. Writes findings as proposals to instance.proposals queue (T-igor-proposals-queue); Igor NE/habits commits accepted proposals to clan.memories — dreaming PROPOSES, Igor DECIDES. Wire a cycle counter into `coa.py` tick() to trigger dreaming.run().

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/cognition/dreaming.py` (new), `wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py` (cycle counter + dreaming.run() call)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; DB writes use direct psycopg2 (same pattern as watch_problems.py, not through cortex.py — avoids HIGH-inertia cortex touch); all written memories human-inspectable; dreaming disabled when IGOR_DREAMING_INTERVAL=0; must not run while `_ne_thread` is alive
**Scope boundary:** IN — dreaming.py module, cycle counter in coa.py, writes to instance.proposals (not directly to clan.memories). OUT — no weight updates, no automated habit execution, no UI, no cortex.py changes.
**Test plan:** dreaming.run() inserts at least one instance.proposals row on seeded psych_log + watch_problems fixture; cycle counter triggers at correct interval; IGOR_DREAMING_INTERVAL=0 disables correctly
